Properties
  NameDescription
ClientProperty
ColumnName
LikeDbColumn
Gets or sets the name of a related database column.
LikeDbTable
Gets or sets the name of a related database table.
SetNullForMissing
If true, values will be set to null if the column is missing in the result.
